final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a futuristic cyberpunk city nightscape (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "赛博朋克" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Syd Mead's 1980s concept art (Blade Runner visual development), 攻殻機動隊 Ghost in the Shell 1995 urban density, Vaporwave neon-grid digital art movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a wide cityscape framing with towering skyscrapers filling the frame and flying cars threading through mid-air — exact framing tightness and depth layering is yours
Subject: must include dense high-rise skyline, neon signs across buildings, flying cars in motion, acid rain falling, ground-level puddles reflecting neon light
Scene/backdrop: must include a futuristic city at night with acid rain atmosphere and wet reflective ground surfaces
Lighting/mood: needs a decadent, tech-saturated night atmosphere with neon glow and rain-diffused light — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a blue-violet dominant direction with neon accent pops — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a wet, rain-slicked surface treatment with atmospheric haze — exact grain and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
